workflowId.value: ={{ (() => { const mode = String($json.media_visual_mode || image).toLowerCase(); if (mode === video) { return $json.text_to_videos_workflow_id || "__TEXT_TO_VIDEOS_WORKFLOW_ID__"; } return $json.text_to_images_workflow_id || "__TEXT_TO_IMAGES_WORKFLOW_ID__"; })() }}
